scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @mypi/ai && npm run build --workspace @mypi/agent && npm run build --workspace @mariozechner/pi-tui && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @mypi/ai && npm run build --workspace @mypi/agent && npm run build --workspace @mariozechner/pi-tui && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @mypi/ai && npm run build --workspace @mypi/agent && npm run build --workspace @mariozechner/pi-tui && vitest run --root ../.. package/coding-agent/test
